query: SELECT id, userId, name, market, aspectRatio, style, genre, totalEpisodes, status, imageEngine, videoEngine_proj, isDeleted, createdAt, updatedAt FROM overseas_projects WHERE userId = 60002 AND isDeleted = false ORDER BY updatedAt DESC
